blog_title: Royal Blue T-Shirt Color Fade After Printing — 240 GSM Wash Test & Reactive Dye Fix for Bulk Orders
caption:
Royal blue faded after printing — but the print held. 😬

Customer called us after losing color on 500 pieces. First wash? Water turned blue. That's weak dyeing, not a print issue.

Here's the test: soak a small swatch in hot water for 15 mins. If it bleeds, fading hits after 5 washes. Always check color fastness before your next bulk order — it saves thousands.

Save this post. Share with your print team 👇
